tasks.instruction: Book a one-on-one soccer coaching session for a 10-year-old on next Saturday at 3:00 PM with a coach rated at least 4.5 stars and priced at or below $60, then continue to the booking summary page.

tasks.instruction: For the upcoming week starting next Monday, add three basketball group training sessions for ages 13–15 to your schedule—one starting before 12:00 PM, one starting at or after 5:00 PM, and one at any other time—then view them on the weekly calendar.
